meta.title: Neural Orb - Immersive AI Interface
meta.description: A cinematic AI-era website generated from the modified cinematic-site-builder plugin runtime.

copy.title: A living interface inside a synthetic star
copy.body: Neural Orb turns model signals, generated media, and spatial control into one cinematic WebGL surface.

copy.title: Generated footage becomes navigable space
copy.body: Poster frames and future mp4/webm loops can be treated with scanlines, glow, distortion, and scroll-scrubbed depth.

copy.title: Every screen bends into the orbital field
copy.body: Layered media planes, beams, particles, and scanlines make product UI feel embedded in the same cinematic system.

copy.title: Signals organize into operational modules
copy.body: Floating blocks reveal how Codex can swap content, media, presets, and motion parameters without rewriting the renderer.

copy.title: A site generator built for cinematic product worlds
copy.body: The plugin packages the workflow, templates, realistic 3D hero system, WebGL media presets, fallback rendering, and validation.
